---
title: "newdirquarto"
format: 
  html:
    href: analysis.html
    text: Analysis
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
dat <- read.csv("data/hemangioma_data.csv")
dat %>% ggplot(aes(x=Age, y=p16)) + geom_point()
1 + 1
```
